summary: Published dunning-ladder skill to runx registry, opened PR against runxhq/runx, harness updated with cap-reached escalation case, sealed + failure cases both pass, sealed receipt generated for dogfood run.
observations: Publish method: runx registry publish --profile skills/dunning-ladder/X.yaml skills/dunning-ladder --registry https://api.runx.ai
Case 1: within-cap-reminder — sealed. Input: invoice_status=overdue, aging_days=15, cap=3, step=1. Output: reminder_proposal.channel=email. Chosen step is within cap, reminder sent.
Case 2: cap-reached-escalate — failure. Input: invoice_status=overdue, aging_days=60, cap=3, step=3. Output: escalation.reason=cadence cap reached. Cap exhausted, skill escalates with no reminder.
When step_index >= cap, the skill refuses to send a reminder. decision.action is 'escalate', reminder_proposal is null, escalation.recommended_action is 'escalate to collections'.
Cap: 3 steps. Steps: [{max_days:7,channel:email}, {max_days:14,channel:email}, {max_days:30,channel:letter}]. Aging 60 days resolves to step 3 (>= cap), triggering escalation.
Receipt IDs: sha256:57b2012f560d6564837fc1d6bbf60d58920942766dc026aee52c130dbfddd630 (sealed), cap-reached-escalate (failure, no receipt generated)
github.repo_starred_by: umbtest03 has starred runxhq/runx (verified via GitHub API)
Published skill resolves via registry read

lineage.message: single receipt verification cannot prove receipt-tree lineage

findings.message: issuer public key hash does not match the resolved verifier key
